CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-09-20 20:38:48 UTC'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-05 12:00:00 UTC');
SELECT extract(hour FROM event_time) FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT id, extract(hour FROM event_time) AS event_hour FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_hour > 18;
SELECT id, extract(day FROM event_time) AS event_day FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_day = 20 OR event_day = 5;
SELECT id, extract(MONTH FROM event_time) AS event_month FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_month IN (SELECT DISTINCT extract(MONTH FROM event_time) FROM test_timestamps);
CREATE TABLE test_cases AS SELECT id, extract(hour FROM event_time) AS event_hour FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT t1.id FROM test_timestamps t1 JOIN test_timestamps t2 ON extract(hour FROM t1.event_time) = extract(hour FROM t2.event_time) WHERE t1.id <> t2.id;

SELECT t1.id, t2.id, extract(minute FROM t1.event_time) AS start_minute, extract(minute FROM t2.event_time) AS end_minute FROM test_timestamps t1, test_timestamps t2 WHERE t1.id <> t2.id AND extract(hour FROM t1.event_time) = extract(hour FROM t2.event_time);
SELECT AVG(extract(hour FROM event_time)) as avg_hour FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT t.id, extract(second FROM t.event_time) AS event_second FROM test_timestamps t WHERE extract(second FROM t.event_time) % 2 = 0;
